name: Designated Settlement Fund Deduction

eligibility.description: Requires a court order, a fund independent of the taxpayer, and an election to extinguish completely the taxpayer's tort liability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can treat payments to a court-ordered settlement fund as 'economic performance,' allowing an immediate deduction for tort liabilities before the funds are actually distributed to claimants.
